sentence: Al ceu nun esta claru hoije.
ipa: al sew nũ esta klaɾu ojʒe
gloss_en: The sky is not clear today.
notes: Masc. sing. article 'al' (Leonese, not PT 'o') and betacism-free [k]-onset per macias2003; final -o>-u ('claru') per carvalho_dias1955.

sentence: Estes çapatos custan quarenta euros.
ipa: estes sapatos kustɐ̃ kwaɾẽta ewɾos
gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: Sibilant merger neutralises voicing per macias2003; seseo ç>[s] (merged with Galician [s], not Castilian [θ]) per vasconcelos1900 EPM II p.54; 3pl -an inherited from the Leonese base per frias_conde_sanabria.

sentence: La reunion ye manhana as tres da tarde.
ipa: la rewnjo je maɲana as tɾes da taɾde
gloss_en: The meeting is tomorrow at three in the afternoon.
notes: Leonese -on [õ] for PT -ão and copula 'ye' per frias_conde_sanabria; palatal <nh> [ɲ] per macias2003.

sentence: Al miou armanu bibe perto del riu.
ipa: al mjou aɾmanu biβe peɾtu del rju
gloss_en: My brother lives near the river.
notes: Betacism /v/>/b/ ('bibe' < vive) and 1sg possessive 'miou' per macias2003, p.26; word-initial trill [r] in 'riu' per carvalho_dias1955.

sentence: Bai en frente i bira pela primeira rua.
ipa: baj ẽ fɾẽte i biɾa pela pɾimejɾa rwa
gloss_en: Go straight ahead and turn on the first street.
notes: Betacism in 'bira' (< vira) per macias2003; trill onset [r] and retained <ei> diphthong per carvalho_dias1955.

sentence: La sopa de peixe estaba mui saborosa.
ipa: la s̺opa de pejʃe estaβa muj s̺aβoɾoz̺a
gloss_en: The fish soup was very tasty.
notes: Imperfect -aba and <ei> diphthong 'peixe' per macias2003; sibilant voicing is neutralised (no [ʃ] coda) per macias2003, p.27.

sentence: Adonde apanho al carru?
ipa: aðõde apaɲu al karu
gloss_en: Where do I catch the cart?
notes: Palatal <nh> [ɲ] in 'apanho' and 'al carru' with article 'al' + final -u per macias2003; trill [r] in 'carru' per carvalho_dias1955.

sentence: Quantas personas benen a la cena?
ipa: kwɐ̃tas peɾsonas benẽ a la sena
gloss_en: How many people are coming to supper?
notes: Betacism 'benen' (< vêm) and nasal [ɐ̃] in 'quantas' per macias2003; feminine article 'la' per frias_conde_sanabria.

sentence: Se you podira, mercaba aquela casa.
ipa: s̺e jow poðiɾa meɾkaβa akela kaz̺a
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that house.
notes: 1sg pronoun 'you'/'ieu' and imperfect-conditional frame per frias_conde_sanabria; 'mercar' (< to buy) and imperfect -aba per macias2003.

sentence: Mercamos fruta i berças na feira.
ipa: meɾkamos fɾuta i beɾsas na fejɾa
gloss_en: We bought fruit and greens at the fair.
notes: Betacism 'berças' (< verças) per macias2003; conjunction 'i' and <ei> 'feira' per carvalho_dias1955.

sentence: Manhana bamos de barcu ata la ilha.
ipa: maɲana bamos de baɾku ata la iʎa
gloss_en: Tomorrow we go by boat to the island.
notes: Betacism 'bamos' (< vamos) per macias2003; palatal <lh> [ʎ] in 'ilha' inherited from the medieval base per frias_conde_sanabria.

sentence: Tchama-me quando tchegares a casa.
ipa: tʃama me kwɐ̃du tʃeɡaɾes a kaz̺a
gloss_en: Call me when you get home.
notes: Affricate <tch> [t͡ʃ] in both 'tchamar' (< clamare) and 'tchegares' (< plicare) per macias2003, p.26 (which reserves <ch>=[ʃ] for Portuguese loans and writes the native PL-/CL- affricate as <tch>); nasal [ɐ̃] in 'quando' per carvalho_dias1955.

sentence: Buônas tardes, enton como bai isso?
ipa: bwɔnas taɾdes ẽtõ komu baj isu
gloss_en: Good afternoon, so how is it going?
notes: Diphthong <uô> [wɔ] in 'buônas' and betacism 'bai' (< vai) per macias2003, p.26; Leonese -on 'enton' [õ] per frias_conde_sanabria.

sentence: Mais bal un paxaru na mano que dous a bolar.
ipa: majs bal ũ paʃaɾu na manu ke dows a bolaɾ
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
notes: Betacism 'bal'/'bolar' (< val/voar) and <x> [ʃ] in 'paxaru' per macias2003; retained <ou> 'dous' per carvalho_dias1955.

sentence: Al gatu pretu duôrme al pie del lhar.
ipa: al ɡatu pɾetu dwɔɾme al pje del ʎaɾ
gloss_en: The black cat sleeps by the hearth.
notes: Diphthong <uô> [wɔ] in 'duôrme' (< dorme) and diphthong <ie> 'pie' per macias2003, p.25-26; article 'al' per frias_conde_sanabria.

sentence: Aquel ratu fugiu para al buracu.
ipa: akel ratu fuxju paɾa al buɾaku
gloss_en: That mouse fled into the hole.
notes: Trill onset [r] in 'ratu' and final -u ('ratu','buracu') per macias2003; article 'al' per carvalho_dias1955.

sentence: Todu al mundo fala deste assuntu.
ipa: toðu al mũdu fala deste asũtu
gloss_en: The whole world talks about this matter.
notes: Final -o>-u ('todu','assuntu') per macias2003, pp.25-26; nasal [ũ] in 'mundo' per carvalho_dias1955.

sentence: Ye mui tchoco quando bebe.
ipa: je muj tʃoku kwɐ̃du beβe
gloss_en: He is very dull when he drinks.
notes: Copula 'ye' and affricate <tch> [t͡ʃ] per macias2003; betacism 'bebe' (< bebe, /b/ retained) per macias2003, p.26.

sentence: La piedra del lhar esta partida.
ipa: la pjedɾa del ʎaɾ esta paɾtiða
gloss_en: The hearthstone is broken.
notes: Diphthong <ie> [je] 'piedra' per macias2003, p.25; palatal <lh> [ʎ] 'lhar' per frias_conde_sanabria.

sentence: Al sol relumbra por riba de las lhombas.
ipa: al s̺ol relũbɾa poɾ riβa de las ʎõbas
gloss_en: The sun shines over the hills.
notes: Coda /l/ 'sol' and trill onset [r] 'relumbra','riba' per carvalho_dias1955; palatal <lh> [ʎ] 'lhombas' per macias2003.
